parameter.name: terms
parameter.description: ranked [termId, term, termKind, description, usageCount, score]

service-call.name: create#moqui.ai.AiNamingSignal
service-call.in-map: [signalId: signalId, signalType: signalType, intentText: intentText, suggestedName: suggestedName, chosenName: chosenName, wasOverridden: overridden, userId: ec.user.userId, fromDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service-call.name: ai.GlossaryServices.find#DomainTerm
service-call.in-map: [text: text, kind: kind, ownerScope: ownerScope, maxResults: maxResults]

service-call.name: create#moqui.ai.AiDomainTerm
service-call.in-map: [termId: termId, term: term, termKind: termKind, description: description, sourceType: 'AI_TSRC_CURATED', statusId: statusId, usageCount: 0, ownerScope: ownerScope]

else.script: Map upd = [termId: termId] if (statusId != null) upd.statusId = statusId if (term != null) upd.term = term if (termKind != null) upd.termKind = termKind if (description != null) upd.description = description ec.service.sync().name("update#moqui.ai.AiDomainTerm").parameters(upd).call()
